title: hieracium foliosissimum
intro: Hieracium foliosissimum, also known as the many-leaved hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family and native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium foliosissimum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Hieracium foliosissimum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
